underlying_goal: Migrate a manual RAG pipeline to native OpenSearch RAG, then improve the conversational search system with better prompt engineering and LLM-based intent analysis, while exploring self-hosted open-source model options
friction_detail: Prompt formatting had corruption requiring multiple bash fixes, and the session hit a rate limit mid-plan forcing a pause.
brief_summary: User wanted to evolve their RAG search from manual to native OpenSearch pipeline, improve intent extraction prompts, and explore self-hosted LLM options for intent analysis; code changes were implemented but the LLM-based conversation architecture was interrupted by rate limits and the session pivoted to researching open-source models.
